title: Thermocycler 4Plates 384PCR 12PrimesSets-32cDNAsQuad
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol preps (4) 384 well plates with a source plate on the Thermocycler module. For a detailed description of protocol steps, please see below. Gantry speed slowed to retard dripping.
steps_raw: This protocol preps (4) 384 well plates with a source plate on the Thermocycler module. For a detailed description of protocol steps, please see below. Gantry speed slowed to retard dripping.
Set Thermocycler Block to 4C and Lid to 40C while closed.
materials_raw: Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher/Life) 4309849 With Barcode 384 Well Plate 30 µL
NEST 96 Well Plate 100 µL PCR Full Skirt #402501
